evals.prompt:
check-offline: Check this file for offline readiness.

```html
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html>
<head><title>Demo</title></head>
<body>
  <link rel="stylesheet" href="style.css">
  <script src="app.js"></script>
</body>
</html>
```
evals.expected_output: Confirms the prototype is offline-ready. No external dependencies flagged.
expectations: Reports offline-ready or no external dependencies detected
Does not flag style.css or app.js as remote dependencies

evals.prompt:
check-offline: Check this file for offline readiness. ```html

Demo

```
evals.expected_output: Flags all three remote dependencies (Babel CDN script, Bootstrap CDN stylesheet, Google Fonts preconnect) and suggests downloading them locally or inlining.
expectations: Flags the Babel CDN script tag as a remote dependency
Flags the Bootstrap CDN stylesheet as a remote dependency
Flags the Google Fonts preconnect link as a remote dependency
Suggests a fix such as downloading locally or inlining

evals.prompt:
check-offline: Check this file for offline readiness.

```html
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html>
<head><title>Demo</title></head>
<body>
<!-- old cdn: <script src="https://cdn.example.com/old-lib.js"></script> -->
<script src="lib.js"></script>
</body>
</html>
```
evals.expected_output: Reports offline-ready. The commented-out CDN URL is not flagged.
expectations: Does not flag the CDN URL inside the HTML comment
Reports the file as offline-ready or no active external dependencies found

evals.prompt: check-offline: Check this file for offline readiness. ```html ```
evals.expected_output: Reports offline-ready. Does not flag the data URI or the URL string literal in JS (it is not inside a fetch or XHR call).
expectations: Does not flag the data: URI image as a remote dependency
Does not flag the URL string literal in the script block as a remote dependency

evals.prompt:
check-offline: Check this file for offline readiness. ```html

Hello

```
evals.expected_output: Flags the Google Fonts @import inside the <style> block as a remote dependency.
expectations: Flags the @import url() inside the style block as a remote dependency
Identifies it as a Google Fonts reference
Suggests downloading the font files locally or using a system font fallback
